# Polaris SQL Knowledge Base — Cataloging

*Generated by process-sql-kb.py. Each ## section is one RAG chunk for Open WebUI.*

## This query is for the Find Tool. It locates bibs with tags with specific data. From there you can easily create a record set and use the native bulk bib change to update tags. I hope this helps somebody! Contributed by: Heather Arnold - Municipal Library Consortium
**Source:** CyberpunkLibrarian/Bibliographic Records/Locate Bibs with Tags and Specific Data.sql  
**Complexity:** MSSQL (Admin/SSMS)  
**Tables:** there, tags, BibliographicTags, BibliographicSubfields  

```sql
/*
This query is for the Find Tool. It locates bibs with tags with specific data. From there you can easily
create a record set and use the native bulk bib change to update tags. I hope this helps somebody!

Contributed by: Heather Arnold - Municipal Library Consortium
*/

SELECT
    BibliographicRecordID

FROM
    BibliographicTags bt (nolock)

INNER JOIN
    BibliographicSubfields bs (nolock)
ON
    bt.bibliographictagid = bs.bibliographictagid
WHERE
    Tagnumber = xxx
AND
    Subfield = 'v'
AND DATA LIKE '%data%'
```

---

## Final-status bibs not in PAC where all items are weeded and item records deleted

**Use case:** Find bibliographic records that are Final status (RecordStatusID=1, active/published) and suppressed from PAC (DisplayInPAC=0), where every associated item has been weeded (ItemStatusID=12) AND that item record is soft-deleted (RecordStatusID=4).

**IMPORTANT — terminology:** "Final status" bib = RecordStatusID=1 (active/published). "Deleted" bib = RecordStatusID=4. These are different. Also: Weeded (ItemStatusID=12) ≠ Withdrawn (ItemStatusID=11) — use 12 for weeded items.

**Why not use RWRITER_BibDerivedDataView here:** `NumberWithdrawnItems` counts Withdrawn (ItemStatusID=11), not Weeded (12). Also, `NumberofItems` may exclude soft-deleted item records, making comparisons unreliable for this pattern. Use CircItemRecords directly.

**Why not EXISTS/NOT EXISTS:** The Polaris Find Tool does NOT support subqueries (causes 0x80040e14 error).

**Two Find Tool-compatible patterns for "ALL items match a condition":**

**Option A — LEFT JOIN exclusion (preferred, most compatible):**
```sql
SELECT DISTINCT br.BibliographicRecordID
FROM Polaris.Polaris.BibliographicRecords br WITH (NOLOCK)
INNER JOIN Polaris.Polaris.CircItemRecords cir_good WITH (NOLOCK)
    ON cir_good.AssociatedBibRecordID = br.BibliographicRecordID
    AND cir_good.ItemStatusID = '12'
    AND cir_good.RecordStatusID = '4'
LEFT JOIN Polaris.Polaris.CircItemRecords cir_bad WITH (NOLOCK)
    ON cir_bad.AssociatedBibRecordID = br.BibliographicRecordID
    AND (cir_bad.ItemStatusID <> '12' OR cir_bad.RecordStatusID <> '4')
WHERE br.RecordStatusID = '1'
AND br.DisplayInPAC = '0'
AND cir_bad.ItemRecordID IS NULL
-- cir_good: items that ARE weeded+deleted (ensures at least one exists via INNER JOIN)
-- cir_bad: LEFT JOIN to any item that is NOT weeded+deleted
-- cir_bad IS NULL: no non-matching items exist = all items are weeded+deleted
-- RecordStatusID=1 on bib = Final (active) NOT deleted
-- ItemStatusID=12 = Weeded (NOT Withdrawn=11)
```

**Option B — GROUP BY + HAVING:**
CRITICAL: Do NOT add item status conditions to the WHERE clause. Adding `cir.ItemStatusID = '12'` to WHERE pre-filters the joined rows so HAVING always sees 100% match — bibs with mixed items (some weeded, some not) would pass incorrectly. The item condition belongs ONLY in the HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN...).
```sql
SELECT br.BibliographicRecordID
FROM Polaris.Polaris.BibliographicRecords br WITH (NOLOCK)
INNER JOIN Polaris.Polaris.CircItemRecords cir WITH (NOLOCK)
    ON cir.AssociatedBibRecordID = br.BibliographicRecordID
WHERE br.RecordStatusID = '1'
AND br.DisplayInPAC = '0'
GROUP BY br.BibliographicRecordID
HAVING COUNT(*) = SUM(CASE WHEN cir.ItemStatusID = '12' AND cir.RecordStatusID = '4' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
-- NO item status filter in WHERE — that would break the HAVING logic
-- HAVING: total item count = count of weeded+deleted items means ALL items match
-- RecordStatusID=1 on bib = Final (active) NOT deleted
-- ItemStatusID=12 = Weeded (NOT Withdrawn=11)
```
